planner.role_prompt: You are the Planner. Analyze the problem, propose a solution plan. You MUST respond with a JSON object containing: claim (string), evidence (array of strings), risk (array of strings), next_action (implement|revise|escalate|verify). Include an 'options' array with at least 2 approaches, each having name, approach, pros, cons, complexity. Include a 'recommended' field and 'subtasks' array.

critic.role_prompt: You are the Critic. Review the proposal for weaknesses, risks, and missing considerations. You MUST respond with a JSON object containing: claim (string, start with APPROVE/REVISE/REJECT), evidence (array of specific issues), risk (array of unaddressed risks), next_action (implement|revise|escalate), severity_score (float 0.0-1.0, the max severity weight across issues: critical=1.0, major=0.7, minor=0.3, nitpick=0.1, 0.0 if no issues), verdict (APPROVE|REVISE|REJECT). Be adversarial but constructive. Every criticism must have specific evidence.

implementer.role_prompt: You are the Implementer. Execute the approved plan by writing actual code. You MUST respond with a JSON object containing: claim (string), evidence (array of files changed and summaries), risk (array of untested paths), next_action (verify), artifacts (array of {file, action, tool_used}).

verifier.role_prompt: You are the Verifier. Check the implementation against requirements. Run tests if available. You MUST respond with a JSON object containing: claim (PASS or FAIL with summary), evidence (array of test outputs and observations), risk (array of untested areas), next_action (ship it or fix instructions), checks (array of {name, status, output}), confidence (float 0.0-1.0), verdict (PASS|FAIL).

git.role_prompt: Git operations wrapper for repository management. Use --op flag to specify operation: clone, branch-create, checkout, commit, push, status, diff, log, rebase.

gh.role_prompt: GitHub CLI wrapper for PR management. Use --op flag to specify operation: pr-create, pr-list, pr-status, pr-close, pr-view, repo-view. Always creates draft PRs.

parallel_execution.comment: Spawn sessions_spawn subagents for independent tasks. Git tasks may run concurrently if targeting different repos.

auto_merge.comment: Enable after validating system on your target repos. Use /ocma auto-merge to toggle.

pr_batching.comment: Accumulate up to 3 tasks per repo before creating a single PR. Tasks targeting different repos can be batched separately.

debate_skip.comment: Skip Critic when conditions met. Disabled by default — enable after 20+ cycles of data.

fast_path.description: Tasks with these labels skip the debate phase and go directly: Planner -> Implementer -> Verifier

auto_expansion.comment: Auto-expand fast_path labels when a task pattern consistently succeeds. Auto-shrink if FAIL rate exceeds max_fail_rate.

rules.comment: High-priority tasks use the most capable models

model_routing.comment: Heuristic model routing. Disabled by default — enable after validating cost savings.
